summary: Completed testing of CELEBRATE pillar 3-step conversation flow fix and emergency triage chips for Mira OS (iteration 212). All 8 tests passed. The CELEBRATE pillar bug has been fixed - ai_context.celebrate_stage is now correctly checked instead of pillar field to continue the multi-step flow.

celebrate_step1_location.details: 'Plan Lola's birthday' returns celebrate_stage='location' with 5 location chips: At home, Pet café, Garden/outdoor, Hotel staycation, Not sure yet

celebrate_step2_size.details: After location answer 'At home', returns celebrate_stage='size' with 5 size chips: Just us, Small (under 6), Medium (6-12), Big party, Not sure yet

celebrate_step3_execution.details: After size answer 'Small, under 6 pups', returns celebrate_stage='execution' with 5 execution chips: Custom cake, Photographer, Party setup, Open request, View in Services. Mode=handoff.

emergency_triage_chips.details: 'I'm scared. Lola ate something weird' triggers triage_first mode and returns exactly 6 chips: Chocolate, Medicine, Grapes/raisins, Plant, Not sure, Go to vet now

location_consent_gate.details: 'Pet cafe near me' returns mode=clarify with consent chips including 'Use current location'

travel_pillar_detection.details: 'I am planning a trip to Goa with Lola' returns pillar=travel (not dine/cafe). Response mentions pet-friendly stays, not cafe booking.

voice_compliance_birthday.details: Birthday request response starts with 'Oh, a celebration for your pet!' - no banned openers

voice_compliance_grooming.details: Grooming request response starts with 'your furry friend's lucky...' - no banned openers

critical_code_review_comments: CELEBRATE pillar fix at line 12487 correctly checks ai_context.celebrate_stage instead of pillar field
Emergency triage chips at lines 12467-12476 correctly return 6 chips per Section 11.3.6
Location consent gate is working - mode=clarify when user says 'near me' without prior consent
Travel pillar detection is now working correctly - 'trip to Goa' returns pillar=travel not dine
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing pet Lola
context_for_next_testing_agent: CELEBRATE pillar 3-step flow (location -> size -> execution) is now working correctly. Emergency triage chips (6 chips) are working. Location consent gate working. Travel pillar detection fixed. All tests in test_mira_celebrate_emergency_iteration_212.py pass.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: CELEBRATE pillar multi-step conversation flow was breaking after step 1
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The condition at line 12363 was checking existing_ticket.get('pillar') != 'celebrate' but the pillar was being set to 'advisory'. The fix was to check ai_context.celebrate_stage instead.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed line 12487 to check current_celebrate_stage = existing_ticket.get('ai_context', {}).get('celebrate_stage') and also added pillar='celebrate' to ticket update at line 12507
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 3 steps of CELEBRATE flow now work correctly with the same session_id
